creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173713
patch from a git commit

... for access to newly announced AWS features.
    
Update dependencies on devel/py-botocore and net/py-s3transfer to
require the same versions as upstream (1.4.46 and 0.1.0, respectively).
    
Remove unnecessary patches for devel/awscli. They do not affect the
build or installation process.
    
https://github.com/aws/aws-cli/blob/develop/CHANGELOG.rst
